en.tagline: Help workers reach local jobs — free to browse, free to quote, no platform fee on the work itself.
en.openSourceNote: Open source. Powered by an AI-driven company. Built with loop engineering.

zh_hk.tagline: 幫助工作者接觸本地工作 — 免費瀏覽、免費報價，工作本身不收平台費。
zh_hk.openSourceNote: 開源專案。由 AI 驅動的公司打造，以 loop engineering 建構。
